description: Nathaniel Malick and Sibyl meet at the end of the episode. Sibyl, now once again a key Chronicom figure, presents Nathaniel with the Time Stream, granting him powerful tools for shaping the future. Their sinister partnership is cemented, setting the stage for future conflict.

transcript.line: You now have the one tool necessary to control your world's future.
Well, lucky me. Aren't you just full of neat tricks, digital lady.
I'm confident we'll make a perfect pair.
